description_long: This is a stylish pair of sunglasses featuring a bold, rectangular full-rim frame with a glossy finish. The frame is relatively thick, providing a sturdy and fashionable appearance, and the temples are straight with a slight curve at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears. The lenses are dark-tinted with a subtle gradient, transitioning from a deeper shade at the top to a lighter hue at the bottom, offering both sun protection and a modern aesthetic. Small metallic accents are visible at the hinge area, adding a touch of sophistication to the overall design. The bridge is a classic saddle style, smoothly connecting the two lenses without any visible nose pads. No visible brand logo or insignia is present on the frame or lenses.
description: A bold, rectangular pair of sunglasses with a glossy full-rim frame and gradient dark lenses, featuring metallic hinge accents and a classic saddle bridge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular frame, gradient lenses, and the smooth saddle bridge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, thick temples and metallic hinge accents.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curvature of the temples and the full-rim frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other temple and hinge details.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with a bold, thick profile and straight temples that curve slightly at the ends. The design is modern and sturdy, with metallic accents at the hinges.
attribute_lens_tint: Dark gradient tint, transitioning from deep purple-black at the top to a lighter shade at the bottom, with a semi-transparent appearance.
attribute_bridge_style: Classic saddle bridge, smoothly integrated into the frame without visible nose pads or additional support structures.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight and thick with a gentle curve at the tips, featuring small metallic hinge accents but no visible engravings or patterns.
